subcodes.first_line: The veil hath been lifted, and the covering removed, and He hath come upon the clouds... O thou harmonious friend [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد کشف الحجاب و رفع النقاب و اتاء علی السحاب... ای یار موافق
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @poems and quotation from poetry
